gig_title: I will deploy an AI support bot for your local business
handles: hours, location, bookings, common questions, quotes

deploy_spec.escalation: auto handoff to human on low confidence
deploy_spec.note: Self-hosted stack; no per-seat SaaS fees.

delivery_steps: 1. Collect KB source (business info + services + FAQ)
2. Train bot on Hermes/OpenClaw + build intents
3. Deploy on Chatwoot across: website + WhatsApp
